form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.59) when fifth over 400m at this track in a Grade 5. Has four wins and eight placings from 23 starts from the draw. Looks a place chance at best.

form.formComment: Placed last time (22.51) at Warrnambool in a Grade 5, finishing second and beaten 6 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from four starts. Has ability and should be around the money.
